changes.value:
File: crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/src/model/identity.rs (71.0% coverage, 66/93 lines)

Uncovered code (~27 lines):
- Move detection logic - entities with same content but different file paths (lines 166-182)
- Rename detection - entities with same structural hash but different names (lines 191-219)
- Similarity threshold boundary cases (lines 296-311)

The core matching (added/deleted/modified) is covered but cross-file move detection and rename detection are not. Create test cases with entities that moved between files or were renamed."
Test sem model identity match_entities edge cases (move/rename detection)
